watchlist.verdict: ARCHIVE — EXITED Jul 15 at $91.63. Net P&L: −$26.32. FDA approved REVTORPYK Jul 14 (3 days early) but sell-the-news on delayed commercial launch (late Q3). Cash redeployed to CAPR.
watchlist.indication: HR+/HER2- PIK3CA wild-type advanced breast cancer
watchlist.notes: ARCHIVE. Entered Jul 15 @ $104.29. FDA approved REVTORPYK Jul 14 (early via RTOR). Stock peaked ~$111 on approval day then sell-the-news to $91.63. Delayed commercial launch (late Q3) + tolerability concerns drove decline. Exited Jul 15 at $91.63 for −$26.32 net loss. Lesson: set GTC sell at realistic day-1 reaction price, not 12-month analyst target. Next CELC catalyst: Q2 earnings (Aug), sNDA filing PIK3CA mutant population (Q3). HC Wainwright $155, Citizens $160, avg $160.64.

watchlist.halal_note: ✅ Clean by business-activity standard. Cardiac cell therapy for DMD — permissible. Prior Zoya/AAOIFI financial ratio flag (9.9% interest income) is irrelevant under Abbas's halal definition. Only business model matters.
watchlist.notes: ORDER PLACED Jul 15: 16 shares @ $20.35 limit — pending fill. AdCom Jul 29 CONFIRMED. PDUFA Aug 22. KEY DATES: (1) Jul 25 — FDA releases briefing documents 2 business days before AdCom. READ THEM. If FDA skeptical of 2.4% LVEF improvement → cut before AdCom. If supportive → hold. (2) Jul 29 — AdCom vote. GTC sell at $33-35 must be pre-set. Sell same day regardless of outcome. Do NOT hold to PDUFA Aug 22. UPDATED PROBABILITY: 55-65% positive vote (revised up from 40-50% — HOPE-3 Phase 3 met ALL endpoints p=0.03/0.04, FDA lifted prior CRL, no review issues identified, put/call now 0.05 very bullish). Prior CRL July 2025 was for HOPE-2 Phase 2 data — HOPE-3 is stronger package. Bull: $35 day-of-AdCom reaction. Bear: $13. Trade math: 16 shares, pass → +$232 net, fail → −$120 net. STRATEGY: sell AdCom reaction same day. Do NOT hold through PDUFA Aug 22.
